questionHtml:
Which phyla have bilateral symmetry?

A. annelida, arthropoda, platyhelmintha

B. porifera, arthropoda, platyhelmintha

C. cnidaria, porifera, mollusca

D. porifera, annelida, mollusca

meta.title: Which phyla have bilateral symmetry? A. annelida, arthropoda, platyhelmintha B. porifera, arthropoda, platyhelmintha C. cnidaria, porifera, mollusca D. porifera, annelida, mollusca
